global_rules: canonical appends and projection changes share one database transaction per operation variant
failed attempt or failed Forecast never advances checkpoint
every object transaction family must cover the object in canonical_appends or operation_variants
no public HTTP endpoint invokes generated-object write transactions

transactions.name: State Tick Commit
preconditions: posterior semantic hashes and physical invariants verified
failure_semantics: transaction rollback leaves no posterior, terminal tick, or checkpoint
Forecast FAILED is handled by F_OPERATIONAL_ATTEMPT_HEALTH
transactions.idempotency: same tick key and hashes returns existing record set; conflict fails

transactions.name: Scenario Commit
failure_semantics: Scenario failure does not roll back source State Tick
transactions.idempotency: same Scenario-set key and hash returns existing set; conflict fails

transactions.name: Forecast Residual Commit
transactions.idempotency: Forecast point plus observation plus matching-rule version

transactions.name: Model Governance Step Commit
transactions.owner: Config, Calibration, Shadow, or Activation service
preconditions: activation has approval and effective tick boundary
transactions.operation_rule: exactly one listed object type per governance transition
projection_writes: active config index CAS only for activation
failure_semantics: failed Activation leaves active binding unchanged

transactions.name: Revision Lineage Step Commit
transactions.owner: Revision Service or Revision Promotion Service

preconditions: candidate lineage complete through current checkpoint
candidate checkpoint and latest refs exist
pointer_switches: latest successful Forecast switch when candidate has COMPLETED Forecast
operation_variants.atomicity: promotion fact and all pointer switches commit together

failure_semantics: declaration or status failure never changes active pointers
candidate remains inactive unless E3 commits
transactions.idempotency: variant-specific deterministic identity and expected-current CAS

transactions.name: Operational Attempt, Health, and Forecast Failure Commit
preconditions: material attempt, health, or Forecast failure event
transactions.operation_rule: append one or more related operational audit records; no lineage object is required
failure_semantics: no posterior, terminal tick, or checkpoint
transactions.idempotency: attempt event identity plus semantic hash

transactions.name: Human Decision Link Commit
failure_semantics: no Approval, Plan, or Task inferred
transactions.idempotency: human decision request id plus semantic hash

transactions.name: Action Feedback Commit
preconditions: at least one trusted execution source exists: receipt_ref or as_executed_ref
actual amount, event time, coverage, source quality, and limitations evaluated
task_ref required only when origin_kind = AO_ACT
transactions.supersession_rule: later Acceptance or corrected execution Evidence appends a superseding feedback record
failure_semantics: untrusted execution Evidence rejected or explicitly ineligible
active model and past State unchanged
NOT_YET_VALIDATED may still be eligible for state input when execution Evidence is trustworthy
transactions.idempotency: source executed-Evidence identity plus normalization version and hash
